reason: Agent messaging and response verification test completed successfully
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Super Agent application displaying agents in sidebar
Step 2: Found and clicked agent "QA-20260419-123509-rudm" in sidebar — Agent detail page loaded with agent name "QA-20260419-123509-rudm" displayed at top
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status showed "idle" before message sent, then transitioned to "working" during processing
Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully typed in input field and sent via send button, new session "Math Question with QA Agent" created
Step 5: Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent processed request and returned response within approximately 1 second (activity indicator showed "Working... 0s" then "Worked for 1s")

Step 6: Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response displays "4" clearly in the chat view, with timestamp "Worked for 1s" below it. Agent status returned to "idle". Screenshot captured at page-2026-04-19T12-36-20-529Z.png
